testcase.name: test_single_chip_warmed_perf_reference[blackhole-blackhole-single-chip-reference]

--------------------------------- Captured Log ---------------------------------

testcase.system-err:
--------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------------------------- It appears as if there is not enough space for /dev/shm/sm_segment.23ff5195c3f7.1000.c06e0000.0 (the shared-memory backing file). It is likely that your MPI job will now either abort or experience performance degradation.
Local host: 23ff5195c3f7 Space Requested: 16777216 B Space Available: 17489920 B -------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2026-07-18 14:18:47.784 | DEBUG | ttnn.device:__init__:152 - Using default dispatch core type for this system: DispatchCoreType.WORKER 2026-07-18 14:18:47.784 | DEBUG | ttnn.device:__init__:154 - Using default dispatch core axis for this system: DispatchCoreAxis.COL 2026-07-18 14:18:48.453 | DEBUG | conftest:mesh_device:599 - multidevice with 1 devices is created 2026-07-18 14:18:50.199 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_PREFILL 2026-07-18 14:18:50.323 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_PREFILL_END 2026-07-18 14:18:50.323 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_DECODE 2026-07-18 14:18:50.352 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_DECODE_REPLAY 2026-07-18 14:18:50.934 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_DECODE_REPLAY_END 2026-07-18 14:18:50.934 | INFO | tracy:signpost:49 - PERF_SINGLE_DECODE_END
